name: AgoraEversole Reduced Client Churn by 9%
short_description: AgoraEversole needed a solution they could scale with - so they chose Synup to offer solutions to their clients
client_challenge:
AgoraEversole needed a partner they could scale with

Based in Jackson, Mississippi, AgoraEversole Marketing Agency specializes in design work, SEO, reputation management, website optimization, and more for their clients. Catering predominantly to financial institutions and healthcare organizations, AgoraEversole offers full-scope digital marketing services to help their clients establish their online presence and boost ROI. 

‍

To effectively manage their clients’ online profiles, reviews, and more, Chris Bates, CEO and Founder of AgoraEversole, knew he needed to find just the right partner: “We wanted a platform that gave us the personalized care we give to our clients. Synup provides that and more.”

‍

When they began scaling their operations, the agency knew they needed a platform that offered more than they were looking for. With a range of services extending far beyond the standard listings management and reputation management, Synup fit the bill.

‍
client_solution:
Synup automates AgoraEversole’s processes so they can service more clientele

As any digital marketer will tell you, there are a lot of tedious, repetitive tasks involved in local SEO. From updating listings to replying to reviews and more, it’s a giant time suck. That’s why AgoraEversole’s clients contract with them in the first place: so they don’t have to deal with the headache (or contract someone in-house to do it for them). 

‍

With a slew of financial services and healthcare organizations in their rolodex, the AgoraEversole team needs to be extra vigilant about complying with standards. After all, Google heavily monitors and polices businesses that fall in the “Your Money Or Your Life” category.

‍

Using Synup, AgoraEversole feels confident in their capabilities to manage their clients’ online presences effectively. With the Synup platform, the agency team can:

  • Manage listings across 70+ platforms
  • Reply to reviews
  • Make crucial business updates
  • Manage consumer relationships
  • Help customers make appointments or find information
  • And more

‍

The team loves it - and their clients do, too!

‍
the_difference:
AgoraEversole can better support clients and achieve better results

As an agency, partnerships can make or break your business. As AgoraEversole expands their services and scales their agency, they know that they can trust Synup to collaborate with them to produce great results for their clients.

‍

Thanks to Synup:

  • Churn is down 9%
  • Phone calls are up 36%
  • Direction requests are up 44%
  • Profile views are up 33%

‍

By getting better outcomes for clients, AgoraEversole has found more success, allowing the business to scale and help more SMBs take their businesses online!

‍
